title: Detour: output detail
summary: This optional slide clarifies why 2D navigation should not automatically bloat every static output.

signals.title: Core output
signals.body: A reader who opens a PDF should see the intended short path first.

signals.title: Full path later
signals.body: A future export option can include detours after their parent core slide.

signals.title: Validation
signals.body: Navigation validation catches missing parents, duplicate detours, and hidden parent slides.

signals.title: Preview rail
signals.body: Studio can reveal detours in context without changing the default exported sequence.

guardrails.title: Keep the short path
guardrails.body: Do not surprise readers with optional depth in default exports.

guardrails.title: Name the option
guardrails.body: A future full-path export should clearly say it includes detours.

guardrails.title: Preserve parent order
guardrails.body: When included, detours should appear immediately after their parent core slide.
